CommunityApplications.Profile: Fully customisable touch LCD dashboard, fan control and smart front-panel LEDs for the UGREEN NASync iDX6011 Pro, running natively on Unraid - no UGOS required. Build your own dashboard pages on the 258x960 front touchscreen from a library of modules (CPU, memory, network, storage, GPU, NPU, power, fans, array status, OS/plugin updates, docker, VMs, and per-item disk/interface/container/VM cards), each with a choice of visual styles - bar, ring, gauge, history graph, area, blocks, split, trend or big number - and theme the font, sizes, colour palette, wallpaper and header logo from the Unraid web UI with a live preview. Drive all four chassis fans on temperature curves (or firmware auto / max), and configure the power/LAN/disk LED colours. Self-contained install with a SHA256-verified payload; model-gated via DMI so it no-ops on other hardware. Requires the BIOS Watchdog Timer disabled and the panel EFI entry set first in the BIOS boot order - see the project README before installing.
